Filter URL: https://www.inaturalist.org/observations?taxon_name=Actaea+racemosa&photo_license=cc-by&quality_grade=research — abundant observations (June-August bloom). Excellent photo pool expected.

URL: biodiversitylibrary.org + flickr.com/photos/biodivlibrary — search species Latin name. 'Ginseng and goldenseal growers handbook 1912' at biodiversitylibrary.org/item/116021 contains engraved illustrations of both species. All pre-1928 material is public domain — no attribution required but crediting BHL is good practice.
